/usr/bin/ar qc libEngine.a CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Core/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Physics/PhysicsSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/SceneManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/LetterText.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Scene/StringText.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Vao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Vbo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Ibo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/QuadMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/BatchMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/CubeMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Renderer/TextTexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libEngine.a
